title: Contact Me – Chi Onwurah MP
headings: h2: Stay in touch on social media
text_excerpt: Contact Me – Chi Onwurah MP Skip to content Home About Me My Record Meet the Team News Newsletter Constituency Corner Find Support Contact Me Home About Me My Record Meet the Team News Newsletter Constituency Corner Find Support Contact Me Search Search How Can I Help YOU? I can raise your issues with government departments, agencies, and local businesses. I can also raise your issues in parliament including petitions, questions, debates, an amendment to a bill, your very own bill, local issues, and guidance. Get in touch with your issues or speak to me directly via our digital surgeries. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to assist Newcastle Central and West constituents. If you live in another constituency, please contact your local MP. Check if I'm your MP Surgeries My surgeries are now held at the Central Library, West End Service Centre or online on the 1st and 3rd Friday of every month. To make an appointment please contact my office by: emailing chi.onwurah.mp@parliament.uk or calling 0191 232 5838. When contacting us please include your name, address, phone number and an outline of the issues you wish to discuss , including relevant reference numbers or times & dates of the events, thank you. Next Surgeries I offer both Face to Face and online surgeries. Please book a session slot before you turn up. Face to Face surgeries take place: 1.00pm-2.00pm on First and Third Friday of the month at Central Library 4.00pm-4.45pm on First Friday of the month at West End Service Centre Online surgeries are held via Zoom: 10.00am-11.00am on First Saturday of the month Email: chi.onwurah.mp@parliament.uk or ring 0191 232 5838 to book a place. Please note that surgeries will not take place on Bank Holidays or in the month of August. Social media I am active on all of my socials, please follow me for constituency updates and news: Twitter: @ChiOnwurah Facebook: @newcastlechi Instagram: chionwurahnclmp I'm here to help As your MP, I can take up issues with the Government, Newcastle City Council, and other organisations on your behalf. I can also raise them in Parliament. Get help with an issue Contact my Newcastle office Phone: 0191 232 5838 Email: chi.onwurah.mp@parliament.uk Contact my Westminster office Phone: 020 7219 7114 Email: chi.onwurah.mp@parliament.uk Stay in touch on social media Facebook Twitter Instagram © 2026 All Rights Reserved.
